---
format: html
title: aggregate_colocated_community_records()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>aggregate_colocated_community_records</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Aggregate Colocated Community Records</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Aggregates same-prefix colocated modern records and keeps cross-database
colocations for inspection.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>aggregate_colocated_community_records(
  data_source = NULL,
  data_coordinates = NULL,
  data_abiotic_long = NULL
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_source">data_source</code></td>
<td>
<p>A long-format community data frame with 'dataset_name', 'sample_name',
'age', 'taxon', and 'pollen_count' columns.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_coordinates">data_coordinates</code></td>
<td>
<p>A coordinate data frame with dataset names in a 'dataset_name' column or
row names and 'coord_long', 'coord_lat' columns.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_abiotic_long">data_abiotic_long</code></td>
<td>
<p>A long-format abiotic table with columns 'dataset_name', 'age',
'abiotic_variable_name', and 'abiotic_value'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A named list containing aggregated analysis streams and traceability tables.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
